title: narcissus tazetta var. algericus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. algericus, also known as the Algerian daffodil or tazetta daffodil, is a variety of the Narcissus tazetta species, a type of bulbous perennial plant with white, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion. The health benefits of consuming Narcissus tazetta var. algericus include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
